step_rationale: Early ACS detection; regulates oxidative stress (SOD2); heart failure biomarker.
mechanism: miR-23a-3p is dysregulated during acute MI, modulating cardiomyocyte oxidative stress and predicting post-MI heart failure.

references.title: Discriminatory power of a circulating multi-noncoding RNA panel in acute coronary syndrome subtypes: Towards precision detection.
references.journal: The international journal of biochemistry & cell biology

references.title: MicroRNAs regulating superoxide dismutase 2 are new circulating biomarkers of heart failure.
